title: Cash Drawer
subtitle: Cash payments must be attached to an open drawer session so the opening float and collected cash reconcile correctly.
selectPlaceholder: Select an open cash drawer session
boundHint: This order's cash leg will be recorded against the selected session below.
dialogDescription: Choose the drawer that will receive this cash collection and record its opening balance before submitting the order.

messages.loadFailed: The cash drawer list could not be loaded right now. Refresh and try again.
messages.noDrawersConfigured: No cash drawers are configured for this branch yet.
messages.noOpenSession: Open a cash drawer session before taking cash for this order.
messages.sessionRequired: Select the cash drawer session that should receive this payment.
messages.selectionRequired: More than one cash drawer session is open. Choose the correct session before submitting.
messages.sessionClosed: The selected cash drawer session is no longer open. Refresh and choose another session.
messages.openFailed: The cash drawer session could not be opened. Try again.
messages.selectDrawer: Select the cash drawer that should be opened.
